{ "name": "spatie/db-dumper", "description": "Dump databases", "keywords": [ "spatie", "dump", "database", "mysqldump", "db-dumper" ], "homepage": "https://github.com/spatie/db-dumper", "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Freek Van der Herten", "email": "freek@spatie.be", "homepage": "https://spatie.be", "role": "Developer" } ], "require": { "php": "^8.0", "symfony/process": "^5.0|^6.0|^7.0|^8.0" }, "require-dev": { "pestphp/pest": "^1.22" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Spatie\\DbDumper\\": "src" } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "Spatie\\DbDumper\\Test\\": "tests" } }, "scripts": { "test": "vendor/bin/pest" }, "config": { "allow-plugins": { "pestphp/pest-plugin": true } } }
